# That Sky MetaSystem
MetaSystem walker for the game. The mod will export all metaclasses from the game.

The project will export CPP-like pseudo-code for all in-game classes, like the example below:
```cpp
// ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// !!!THIS FILE IS GENERATED BY COMPUTER!!!
// Date: 2026-04-18 Time: 18:53:02
// <https://github.com/that-sky-project/that-sky-metasystem>
// ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

class ExampleClass: public Object {
  ExampleClass() = default;

  // -- Functions.

  void /* At 0x140001000 */ Update(Game, MetaSystem);

  // -- Members.

  // Each registered MetaMemberVariable has its type, offset and optional default
  // value.
  bool member_0x0 = false;
  // Gap is only for aligning.
  char gap_0x1[3];
  uint32_t member_0x4;
}

class ExampleClassVirtual: public ExampleClass {
  ExampleClassVirtual() = default;
  // The mod actually cannot export the full virtual function table, so it use
  // a virtual destructor as a placeholder.
  virtual /* At 0x140001000 */ ~ExampleClassVirtual() = default;

  // -- Functions.

  // -- Members.

  // The member offset is based on the current object, so for those classes has
  // vftable, all offsets is added by 8.
  uint64_t member_0x10;
}
```
